summary: CLI serve command is well-implemented with backend selection and proper configuration options.

observations.description: Serve command supports multiple backends (vllm, llama-cpp) with proper selection logic
Configuration options include --port, --host, --cache-dir for flexible deployment
CLI properly integrates with create_app() for server instantiation
Help text and error messages are clear and informative

codeQuality.notes: Clean CLI implementation using existing CLI framework patterns

testCoverage.notes: Tests verify CLI integration with serve command
